claim: Intramembrane cleavage by signal peptide peptidase aids in the degradation of proteins with a complex membrane orientation.
evidence_sentences: Here we show that the evolutionary conserved rhomboid family protein RHBDL4 is a ubiquitin-dependent ER-resident intramembrane protease that is upregulated upon ER stress.
RHBDL4 cleaves single-spanning and polytopic membrane proteins with unstable transmembrane helices, leading to their degradation by the canonical ERAD machinery.
